name: Galaxy S20 FE
notes:
1. Enable 'OEM Unlocking' in Settings > Developer Options before unlocking bootloader.
2. Bootloader unlock WILL wipe all user data — back up first.
3. US carrier variants may have bootloader unlock disabled; use international (SM-G781B) for full support.
4. Flash vbmeta with --disable-verity --disable-verification to allow custom ROMs.
5. For A/B devices, CyberFlash flashes the inactive slot and then sets it as active.

edl_entry_methods: Method 1 (Key Combo): Power off device. Hold Vol DOWN + connect USB cable.
Method 2 (ADB, if partially booting): adb reboot edl
Method 3 (Last Resort - Test Points): Requires device disassembly. Short test points on motherboard.
IMPORTANT: Samsung EDL mode (Download Mode) uses a different VID/PID than Qualcomm standard.
